info.name: Product Modifier Group Assignment
info.description: API collection for assigning/removing modifier groups to/from products

request.description:
Retrieve all modifier groups assigned to a specific product.

**Required Permissions:** GUEST or higher

**Path Parameters:**
- `restaurantUuid`: UUID of the restaurant
- `productUuid`: UUID of the product

**Response:** List of modifier group details

Assign a modifier group to a product. This allows customers to customize the product with modifiers from this group.

**Required Permissions:** MANAGER or higher

**Path Parameters:**
- `restaurantUuid`: UUID of the restaurant
- `productUuid`: UUID of the product
- `modifierGroupUuid`: UUID of the modifier group to assign

**Response:** 204 No Content on success

**Example Use Cases:**
- Assign "Extra Toppings" modifier group to "Pepperoni Pizza"
- Assign "Size" modifier group to "Coffee"
- Assign "Side Dishes" modifier group to "Burger"

Remove a modifier group assignment from a product.

**Required Permissions:** MANAGER or higher

**Path Parameters:**
- `restaurantUuid`: UUID of the restaurant
- `productUuid`: UUID of the product
- `modifierGroupUuid`: UUID of the modifier group to remove

**Response:** 204 No Content on success
